title: Speedy
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Nickname}} {{Youmay|the Sullustan|[[Wookieepedia:Speedy deletions]]}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image= |name=Speedy |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]]''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Hey, to me an explosion is an explosion.''"
"''Yes. But to me, a human is a human.|[[Samuel Raider]] and Speedy|}} "'''Speedy'''" was the nickname of a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] who served aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was called Speedy by the other pilots as they could not pronounce his real name. In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], Speedy completed his training and entered active duty, successfully completing two missions shortly after [[Operation Strike Fear]]. The Sullustan was present in the pilot's lounge of the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] for a conversation between [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] pilots about their preferred [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] targets, with Speedy mentioning his particular dislike for [[Alpha-class Xg-1 Star Wing/Legends|Assault Gunboats]]. A cultural divide separated the Sullustan pilot from Red Squadron, with his fellow [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilots]] understanding neither his jokes nor his references to [[scarns]]. Despite this, Speedy returned to the company of Red Squadron's pilots in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]] after receiving special reconnaissance training due to his Sullustan navigational skills, witnessing [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander's]] attempt to use a [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on [[Samuel Raider]] and recruitment of rookie pilots such as [[Casal Marskan]] with promises of power through the Force. After Marskan's [[Death/Legends|death]], Speedy, along with Raider and [[Ernek Marskan|Marskan's brother]], grew to distrust and hate Farlander, alienating him from his fellow pilots. ==Sources== *''[[X-Wing: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Aliases, nicknames, and pseudonyms]] [[Category:Alliance Starfighter Corps personnel]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Sullustans]]
